recentChanges.action: Updated changelog+status. Breakout spec complete (build next). UX/UI 5/7 card CSS. Shared game-over overlay risk surfaced.

PHASE 3 BUILD: Breakout Prism Shatter built and deployed. 724-line game with 5 level layouts, combo multipliers (up to 3.0x), 3 power-ups (wide/multi/slow), 3 brick types, 7 zzfx sounds, crystal shatter particles, prismatic clear explosion, ball trail from level 4+, hard mode loop. Old inline breakout removed. 3/7 games migrated.
